Shami said he had paid everything required. However, their legal battle over maintenance continues, with the matter currently also being heard by the Supreme Court of India.

description: Kolkata Knight Riders, needing a win to stay in IPL 2026 playoff contention, opted to bowl first against Mumbai Indians at Eden Gardens. Skipper Ajinkya Rahane expressed the team's focus on winning their remaining two games. Mumbai, already out of the running, welcomed back Hardik Pandya and Suryakumar Yadav, aiming to finish strongly.

title: Can AAP be de-registered? Why HC rejected plea against Kejriwal, Sisodia
description: In a significant ruling, the Delhi High Court has rejected a Public Interest Litigation aimed at disqualifying Arvind Kejriwal, Manish Sisodia, and Durgesh Pathak, as well as terminating their party's registration. The court found the petition to be 'seriously misguided,' emphasizing that disqualification and deregistration must be backed by solid legal foundations under election regulations—criteria that were unfortunately unmet.

title: Anupam Kher shares mantra for a happy 41-year marriage with Kirron Kher

description: Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni used the Hindi phrase 'parishram hi safalta ki kunji hai' to describe the growing India-Italy ties, emphasizing hard work as key to success. The two nations upgraded their bilateral relations to a Special Strategic Partnership, unveiling a Joint Strategic Action Plan for 2025-2029, aiming for a 20 billion euro trade target.

title: 'US is offering to help': Rubio posts Spanish-language video addressing Cubans
description: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio addressed Cubans on their Independence Day, highlighting severe hardships and blaming the communist leadership, particularly the military conglomerate GAESA, for plundering billions. title: Leaked audio catches Meta CEO explaining exactly why company is tracking employees
description: Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg, in leaked audio from an April 30 all-hands meeting, confirmed the company is tracking employee keystrokes, mouse movements, and screen activity to train its AI models—and admitted Meta deliberately withheld details to protect its competitive edge. The audio, obtained by More Perfect Union, reveals Zuckerberg justified the surveillance by saying Meta employees are smarter than outside contractors. The disclosure came days before Meta began laying off 8,000 workers.

'Gave them car, 10 tola gold': Woman dies by suicide due to 'dowry' harassment
description: A 21-year-old woman allegedly died by suicide in Gwalior, with her family accusing her in-laws of dowry harassment and physical abuse. The family claims the in-laws demanded a car and withheld her 'Stridhan' shortly after the wedding. Police are investigating the incident, awaiting medical and forensic reports to register a case.

Rafael Nadal and Mery Perello net worth 2026: Fortune and investments
description: Rafael Nadal and Mery Perello’s combined net worth in 2026 is estimated at nearly $260 million. Nadal earned most of his fortune through tennis prize money, endorsements, and business investments. The couple also owns luxury properties and runs successful projects like the Rafa Nadal Academy. Despite their huge wealth, they continue to live a quiet and private life in Mallorca, Spain.

title: World’s hottest city is in UP: What’s making Banda so unbearably hot
description: Banda, a district in Uttar Pradesh's Bundelkhand region, has repeatedly recorded the world's highest temperatures, becoming a man-made heat island. Experts attribute this to barren terrain, vanishing green cover, relentless sand mining, and drying rivers, creating a vicious cycle of extreme heat.  This situation is exacerbated by dry westerly winds and a lack of adequate winter rainfall.

title: 7-year-old gets stuck between lift grille and door in Pune housing society, dies
description: A seven-year-old boy tragically died after becoming trapped between a lift's collapsible grille and wooden door in a Pune housing society. The incident occurred as the lift ascended, with residents discovering the boy stuck later. He was pronounced dead at the hospital, and police are investigating maintenance records.

title: Jeff Bezos emerges as favorite to buy Paul Allen’s Seahawks stake
description: Amazon founder Jeff Bezos is projected as the leading buyer for the Seattle Seahawks. The NFL team was owned by late former Microsoft co-founder Paul Allen. After his passing in 2018, it is now managed by her sister Jody Allen under the Paul G. Allen Trust. It is now officially up for sale. Jeff Bezos has shown interest in owning a local NFL franchise for over seven years. The sale process is expected to conclude by the 2026 offseason.

title: Oilers linked to Alex Tuch amid NHL free agency contract rumors
description: NHL trade rumors are heating up as free agency approaches, and Alex Tuch of the Buffalo Sabres is reportedly in the Edmonton Oilers’ crosshairs. Recent rumors suggest Tuch’s contract value is taking a hit due to his inconsistent play in the playoffs. It’s an opportunity for Edmonton, who are searching for top-six scoring depth and tight salary cap restrictions and roster restructuring needs.

title: Ronda Rousey’s net worth 2026: Earnings, endorsements and lifestyle
description: Ronda Rousey, a trailblazer in combat sports, is projected to have a net worth of nearly $14 million by 2026. Her fortune stems from lucrative UFC and WWE careers, acting, endorsements, and book sales. Rousey's impact on women's MMA and her transition to WWE cemented her status as a crossover star, ensuring her continued relevance and earning potential.

title: Fact check: Was Aaron Rodgers seen with wife after Steelers contract?
description: Aaron Rodgers, the NFL veteran, recently signed a one year deal with the Pittsburgh Steelers, as retirement rumors dominated the headlines, sparking chaos among millions of fans. Amid all the speculations, the spotlight remains on Aaron Rodgers’ wife even as he continues to maintain privacy about his marital life. Through all of this, a picture of Aaron Rodgers with a woman has convinced millions that the identity of his wife has finally been revealed.
